response.justification: The candidate is technically strong and comfortably exceeds every hard requirement — deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience, REST and web architecture expertise, Kubernetes and AWS exposure, and recent AI-agent/MCP work that matches the nice-to-haves. However, this is an entry-level position and the candidate has nearly two decades of experience at senior and staff level, which raises serious concerns about role fit, compensation expectations, and long-term retention. Basic German may also be a friction point for a high on-site role in a German-market renovation/energy domain.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React track record across multiple product companies
Nice-to-have alignment: LLM/MCP tooling, AWS (CDK), Kubernetes, Docker
Solid engineering culture fit: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, knowledge sharing
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level role — retention and salary mismatch risk
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience (MongoDB/MySQL listed instead)
Only basic German for a high on-site role in a German-market domain

key_factors.factor: Full coverage of required tech stack
